title: HIR normalization pass (for-loop desugaring)
body:
## What was done

Implemented a **HIR normalization** pass that desugars `for` loops into `while` loops (and related control-flow shapes) so later analysis and lowering see a smaller core grammar.

## Why it mattered

Desugar at HIR layer keeps the surface grammar ergonomic while semantic rules and lowering only implement normalized forms—pattern reused for string interpolation desugar later in the band.

## Outcome

Reduced duplicate control-flow logic in type checking and visitor refactors.

source.subject: Add HIR normalization pass with for-loop desugaring to while-loop transformation
